nodes.name: 爪哇雀鹛
nodes.summary: The Javan fulvetta (Alcippe pyrrhoptera) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is endemic to Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. The species is monotypic: no subspecies are recognised. References Collar, N. J. & Robson C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70 – 291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.
nodes.shortSummary: The Javan fulvetta (Alcippe pyrrhoptera) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is endemic to Indonesia.

nodes.name: 爪哇雀鹛
nodes.summary: 爪哇雀鹛（Alcippe pyrrhoptera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如爪哇雀鹛。

nodes.name: Alcippe
nodes.summary: Alcippe（Alcippe）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如褐脸雀鹛、黑眉雀鹛、褐雀鹛等10种鸟类。
